sections.title: Use of Want — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Use of Want — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Use of Want is an essential building block of spoken and written English. Formula: Subject + want/wants + to + verb / noun. Rules: 'Want' is used with I, you, we, they (base form) | 'Wants' is used with he, she, it (singular) | Want can be followed by a noun (I want water) or 'to + verb' (I want to go) | Negative: do not want / does not want

examples.hindi: वह एक नई नौकरी चाहता है।
हम एक बड़ा घर चाहते हैं।
वे इस project को खत्म करना चाहते हैं।
examples.english: They want to finish this project.

sections.title: Use of Want — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Use of Want — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Here are everyday sentences using Use of Want that you will use in daily conversation, at home, and with friends.

examples.english: I do not want this book.

examples.hindi: वह मुझसे बात करना चाहता है।
examples.english: He wants to talk to me.
She wants to become a doctor.

sections.title: Use of Want — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Use of Want — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Use of Want in professional and office contexts so you can use it confidently at work.

examples.hindi: मुझे इस काम को जल्दी खत्म करना है।
examples.english: I want to finish this work quickly.

examples.hindi: क्या तुम बाहर जाना चाहते हो?
examples.english: Do you want to go outside?

sections.title: Use of Want — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Use of Want — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: Learn how to make negative sentences and questions using Use of Want. Common mistakes: forgetting to keep the base verb form, or wrong subject agreement.

examples.hindi: हम एक बेहतर भविष्य चाहते हैं।

examples.english: I want to know the truth.

examples.hindi: वह अपना business शुरू करना चाहती है।
examples.english: She wants to start her own business.
I do not want any mistake.
